The old way vs. the Agently way

Building AI in-house is broken. We fix it.

Building it yourself

  • Hire expensive developers to build it
  • Wait months for something to go live
  • Manage infrastructure, bugs, and updates yourself
  • Still not sure if it actually works

Months

Typical time to deployment

The TTMD way

  • Describe your workflow in plain language
  • We design, build, and configure your agent
  • Deployed and hosted — we monitor everything
  • Live in days, not months

24 hours

Average time from brief to live agent

24 hours

Brief to live agent

Zero code

Required from you

100%

Managed & hosted

How it works

Three steps to your first AI agent

01

Tell us your workflow

Describe what you want to automate — in plain language, no specs needed.

$ describe your workflow
> What do you want to automate?
You: Handle customer support emails
> Any specific tools or channels?
You: Gmail + Zendesk
> Got it. We'll build that.
02

We build your agent

Our team designs, trains, and configures your agent on our platform.

Building your agent...
 
✓ Workflow mapped
✓ Agent configured
✓ Connected to Gmail + Zendesk
✓ Testing responses...
✓ Agent ready
03

You go live

Your agent is deployed and hosted. We monitor it. You just watch it work.

agent status: live ✓
 
→ 24 tickets handled today
→ 92% resolved automatically
→ 3 escalated to your team
 
Uptime: 99.9%

Use cases

What businesses use it for

From answering customer questions to qualifying leads — any repetitive workflow is a candidate for an AI agent.

Customer Support Agent

01

Handles FAQs, tracks orders, and escalates complex issues — without a support team on call. Available 24/7 across every channel your customers use.

Lead Qualification Agent

02

Engages visitors, asks qualifying questions, and routes hot leads directly to your inbox. Your sales team only speaks to prospects who are ready to buy.

Booking & Scheduling Agent

03

Lets clients self-book, reschedule, and get reminders — synced to your calendar automatically. No back-and-forth, no missed appointments.

Document Q&A Agent

04

Upload your manuals, policies, or reports. Your agent answers staff or client questions instantly — always grounded in your actual documents.

Order Tracking Agent

05

Gives customers real-time order status, shipping updates, and return instructions automatically — reducing support tickets and keeping customers informed.

Something Else? We'll Build It.

06

Every business has workflows that don't fit a template. Tell us what you need to automate and we'll design a custom agent built specifically around your process.

Managed hosting

Your agents run on our infrastructure

You don't need a server, a developer, or an IT team. Once your agent is live, we handle everything - hosting, monitoring, updates, and support. You just use it.

Your agentsLive

Customer support agent

142 conversations today

Active

Lead qualification agent

38 leads scored today

Active

Booking agent

17 appointments booked

Active
All agents monitored 24/7Uptime: 99.9%

One dashboard for all agents

See every agent you run in one place — their status, activity, and recent conversations. No logging into multiple tools.

Real-time monitoring

We watch your agents around the clock. If something behaves unexpectedly, we catch it and fix it before you notice.

Automatic updates

As AI models improve, your agents improve too. We handle all updates and retraining — nothing for you to manage.

Secure by default

Your data stays yours. Agents run in isolated environments, and we never share or train on your business data.

Changes on request

Need to tweak how your agent responds or expand what it does? Just tell us — we handle the update and redeploy.

No infrastructure required

No servers, no APIs to maintain, no DevOps overhead. We host everything so you can focus entirely on your business.

FAQ

Questions we get a lot

Ready to automate your first workflow?

Book a free 20-minute call. We'll tell you exactly what's possible for your business, and what it'll take to get your first agent live.
